hypothesis: A sleeve/weekday combination that loses after current FTMO costs in at least four of five development years may represent a stable calendar defect rather than useful challenge density.

selection_contract.weekday_basis: Prague calendar weekday at trade entry
selection_contract.action: Exclude only the qualifying entry weekdays from that sleeve; all weights and policy parameters remain locked.

development_gate.survivor_rule: The one mechanically derived manifest must strictly improve both normal and adverse pass rates.

validation_gate.open_rule: Open only after the development survivor rule passes.
validation_gate.survivor_rule: The unchanged weekday exclusions must strictly improve both normal and adverse 2023 pass rates.

sealed_holdout.open_rule: Open once only after development and 2023 both pass.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
